title: Paramount’s Warner deal gets conditional approval in the EU.
summary: While Paramount’s $110 billion WBD merger is suddenly on hold in the US , in Europe, the European Commission is ready to allow it after Paramount agreed to concessions including giving up its stake in United International Pictures within 13 months of…
